query:
just a question.. our agents commonly get this: unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3770", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3770", expected 
     i64                                                             
                               
● unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3771", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")                   
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3771", expected 
     i64                                                                                              
                                                                                                      
● unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3774", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3774", expected 
     i64                                                             
                                                                                                      
● unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3775", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")                   
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3775", expected 
     i64                                                                                              
                                                                                                      
● unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3770", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")                   
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3770", expected 
     i64                                                                                              
                                                                                                      
● unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3771", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")                   
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3771", expected 
     i64                                                   
                                                                                                      
● unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3774", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")                   
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3774", expected 
     i64                                                                                              
                                                                                                      
● unimatrix - context_get (MCP)(id: "3775", feature: "crt-031", format: "markdown")                   
  ⎿  Error: MCP error -32602: failed to deserialize parameters: invalid type: string "3775", expected 
     i64                                                ... is the MCP interface that unique to require actual number?

entries.title: How to add an integer parameter to an existing MCP tool in unimatrix-server
MCP embedding init failure blocks all operations — needs degraded mode
context_get id must be a bare integer — quoted strings cause type errors; 38 failures in crt-031
Custom serde deserializer + schemars schema override for MCP tool param structs
MCP Tool Permission Errors on context_store Block Knowledge Stewardship
